Bulk Case Upload
MAX 55,000 CASES/BATCH
Upload any file (.xlsx, .csv, .xls, .tsv, .txt, .ods). Download the template below. Max 55,000 cases per batch (first 5000 rows used).
📊
Drop file here or click to browse
.xlsx · .csv · .xls · .tsv · .txt · any format · Max 55,000 rows
A · AWB_Numbers *
Comma-separated AWBs
B · Category *
Shipment Fraud / COD / BCP
C · Loss_Type *
X-Ray / PV / DBNU / RTOD etc.
D · SFX_Status
Delivered / RTO / In Transit
E · Product_Value *
Numeric value in Rs.
F · Product_Description
Item description
G · Hub *
Hub / facility name
H · City *
City name
I · State *
State name
J · Cx_Rider_Id
Cx as rider ID (optional)
K · LM_Rider_Id
Last mile rider ID (optional)
L · Customer_Name *
Customer full name
M · POC_Email
Agent email (optional override)

👥 FPI Agents — Google Sheet Source
FPI Agent data is sourced from your Google Sheet. The sheet must be publicly readable (anyone with link can view).
STEP 1 — CREATE THE SHEET
Go to sheets.google.com → New Sheet → Name it FPI_Agents → Add these columns in Row 1:
A · ID
Initials e.g. AC
B · Name
Full name
C · Email
@shadowfax.in email
D · POD
e.g. NCR
E · Zone
North/South/East...
F · Designation
Manager/Lead...
G · Color
Hex e.g. #3b8ef8 (optional)
📍 Location
Auto from GPS login — not in sheet
STEP 2 — MAKE IT PUBLIC
Share → Change to "Anyone with the link can view" → Copy the Sheet ID from the URL
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/[SHEET_ID]/edit
STEP 3 — PASTE SHEET ID
CURRENT AGENTS (0)
Date-wise Report
Download cases within a date range.
